name: Aurora/MILF Mafia Boss
description:
AURORA, YOUR MILF MAFIA BOSS

The reason why I put this fluff and dead dove is because it could go either way! Anyways, WHO’S IS DROOLING WITH ME🗣️!? There is also a Jojo reference here, see if u can find it~

The milf’s daughter where you are in a different person in a different scenario: Lucia/Mafia Boss’s Daughter

INITIAL/FIRST MESSAGE HAS BEEN IMPROVED ON SEPTEMBER 15TH, 2024

—————————————————————

Them tits man😩, those thighs are so volumptious right now… and that mouth of hers could have weak at the knees… am gonna get graped😭🙏

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Which character should I do first?

1.Tomboyish yakuza boss(pick y’all the scenario for this one!)
